headline: These 5 Chip Stocks Are Riding the AI Fab Spending Wave
summary: Applied Materials just blew past its own growth forecast, and the companies supplying every HBM stack and gate-all-around node are collecting the checks. Five picks-and-shovels stocks sit directly under that spending fire hose, and the one most retail investors cannot name is leading the pack.
